name: Bodycote PLC
description: The world's largest provider of thermal processing services (heat treatment, HIP, surface technology) serving aerospace, automotive, energy and general industrial markets.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Global thermal processing demand across aerospace (recovery), automotive (EV transition), energy and general industrial. Revenue £757m in FY2024 (-5.7% on weaker volumes). Specialist Technologies growing.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin expanded to 17.0% in FY2024 despite lower revenues — strong operational leverage and mix shift toward higher-margin Specialist Technologies. Target continued margin improvement.
assumptions.risks: Cyclical industrial exposure, automotive sector transition to EV (fewer heat-treated parts), FX exposure (>70% non-GBP revenue), £78m exceptional charges in FY2024 (ERP, optimisation, goodwill impairment).
assumptions.catalyst: Aerospace aftermarket recovery, Specialist Technologies growth, share buyback programme (shares reduced from 191.5m to 183m), operational efficiency improvements.
